 -Rules : Agent(?a), hasCapability(?a, ?c), GraspingCapability(?c), Object(?o), hasDisposition(?o, ?d), GraspableDisposition(?d), isReachableBy(?o,?a), EndEffector(?g), hasComponent(?a,?g), hasOpeningWidth(?g,?w1), hasHoldingPartWidth(?o,?w2), greaterThan(?w1,?w2) -> canGrasp(?a, ?o)
	GraspingCapability|EquivalentTo|(isCapabilityOf some (hasComponent some Gripper)
	GraspableDisposition|EquivalentTo|isDispositionOf some (hasPart some GraspablePart)
answers.answer: the tiago robot can grasp the suitcase because it has a grasping capability, and it has a two-finger claw component, the suitcase has a holding part width that is greater than the two-finger claw's opening width, and the robot can reach the suitcase.
